description_long: This object is a stylized hot dog resting on a flat, square tray. The hot dog consists of a light brown, rectangular bun that encases a darker brown sausage, which is visible along the top. The sausage is slightly recessed into the bun, with both ends of the sausage peeking out from the bun. The tray beneath is a simple, raised platform with a smooth, matte finish, likely intended to represent a serving surface. There are no visible condiments or grill marks on the sausage or bun. The overall appearance is blocky and geometric, with clean edges and a minimalist design.
description: A blocky hot dog with a brown sausage in a tan bun, placed on a square serving tray. No condiments or grill marks are visible.
description_view_0: The hot dog is seen from a slight angle, showing the top of the bun and sausage, with the tray clearly visible beneath.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front end of the hot dog, with the sausage end protruding slightly from the bun.
description_view_2: The hot dog is viewed from the opposite side, showing the other end of the sausage and the bun's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this angle shows the front end of the hot dog, but from a mirrored perspective.
